Ideal for two travelers, the hotel offers an exclusive on-site restaurant perfect for enjoying local cuisine, along with room service for convenience. Each room is equipped with refreshing air conditioning and complimentary Wi-Fi, ensuring a comfortable stay while you take in breathtaking views of the surrounding landscape. Personalized tours are available to help you uncover the area's hidden gems. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

comments.responderName: Collection O Banda Aceh near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman formerly Hotel Mulana
comments.responseText:
Dear Guest,

Terima kasih atas ulasan Anda yang sangat positif dan detail. Kami sangat senang mengetahui Anda menikmati lokasi hotel yang strategis, kebersihan kamar dan kamar mandi, kenyamanan tempat tidur, serta kesejukan AC selama menginap. Kami juga bangga mendengar bahwa staf kami dapat memberikan pelayanan yang ramah dan profesional sehingga membuat Anda merasa nyaman sejak check-in.

Rekomendasi Anda sangat berarti bagi kami dan menjadi motivasi untuk terus menjaga kualitas layanan serta kenyamanan tamu. Kami sangat menantikan kedatangan Anda kembali di Banda Aceh.

Kind regards,
Liya
Collection O Banda Aceh near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman formerly Hotel Mulana
comments.reviewComments:
​I recently stayed at this hotel, which was formerly known as Hotel Mulana, and I am honestly very happy with the overall experience. It is located in a great spot near the Baiturrahman Grand Mosque, which makes exploring the heart of Banda Aceh so much easier.
​The room and the bathroom were both spotlessly clean when I arrived. I really appreciated that because it shows they care about hygiene. The bed was very comfortable and the AC was nice and cold, so I could relax properly after a busy day.
​The staff were also professional and friendly. They made me feel welcome from the moment I checked in. What impressed me the most is that all the facilities are exactly what you would expect for the price. It is very rare to find a place where everything is so well-aligned with the cost, and for me, it offered excellent value for money.
​I also noticed how convenient the location is for finding local food and getting around the city. The atmosphere is calm enough for a good rest, yet you are still close to all the main attractions. It is definitely a reliable and practical place to stay.
​Overall, I am very satisfied with my choice. If you are visiting Banda Aceh and want a clean, comfortable, and affordable place with a great team, I highly recommend staying here.

comments.reviewComments: Deceived by the cover. At first glance, I thought this hotel looked just okay from the outside. I was originally staying at a bigger hotel for the same price, but I canceled because that hotel asked for an additional fee of about 58,000 that did not match the application. In the end, I moved to this hotel. After checking in, I only paid what was indicated in the application. And the amazing thing is, this hotel is even cleaner than the hotel I rejected earlier. The room is very clean, towels, sheets, everything is clean. The air conditioner is cold, although it takes a bit of time, and the hot water is quite okay. Drinking water is not provided, but there is refillable water/aqua and cups in the hallway. The Wi-Fi is fast. For those of you who want to stay in Caisar, it's better to choose this hotel. I guarantee you will be more satisfied. You can also find food and buy various things in front of the hotel, with an Indomart and stalls around the hotel. The service is also good.
comments.originalComment: Tertipu sampul. Awal nya sekilas saya melihat hotel ini dr luar biasa aja. Tadinya saya menginap di hotel lain yg lebih besar dengan harga yang sama, tapi sya cancel karena pihak hotel lain itu minta tmbahan skitar 58rb yg tdak sesuai dgan aplikasi. Akhirnya saya pindah ke hotel ini. Dan setalah saya check in hanya bayar sesuai aplikasi. Dan keren nya lagi, ternyata hotel ini bahkan lebih bersih dr hotel yg saya tolak sebelumnya. Kamar bersih banget, handuk, seprai smuanya bersih. Ac dingin, wlopun agak lama, air panas ckup ok. Air mnum tdak di sediakan, tp di lorong kamar ada air isi ulang/aqua dan gelas. Wifi kencang. Utk anda yg mau mnginap di caisar mending anda ke hotel ini. Saya jamin lebih puas. Mau makan dan beli ini itu juga dpan hotel tersedia, ada indomart dan kios di sekitaran hotel. Pelayanan juga bagus.
